note: mypy --no-incremental --config-file mypy.ini -p odoo.{orm,db,libs,http,service,modules}; grep -cE ": error:". mypy 1.19.1, Py 3.14.4. Measured on an ISOLATED worktree. History: reconciled down from a stale 1493 (HEAD had silently drifted to 1510 -- post-5e823bd orm commits, notably 23b5c9ec's CacheMixin/Registry split which relocated [attr-defined] from cache.py to recompute.py, changed the count without updating this floor). Then paid down via TYPE_CHECKING-only _ModelStubs extensions that declare real cross-mixin members so siblings stop seeing [attr-defined]: _origin/_table_sql properties, _check_company_auto, _validate_fields, get_property_definition, _check_company, modified, _modified_before, _recompute_recordset, invalidate_recordset, flush_recordset, _determine_fields_to_fetch, the _spawn classmethod, and _has_field_access/_check_field_access (the last pair unlocked by narrowing the deprecated check_field_access_rights operation to Literal['read','write']; _has_field_access ignores operation, so behavior is unchanged). Plus two dedups: one2many non-stored-write (-3) and the _create COPY/INSERT row-builder (_build_insert_rows, -6, which also collapsed a duplicate convert_to_column_insert type error 2->1). Each step a pristine reduction with zero genuinely-new errors. HEAD is now 1447, 46 below the prior 1493 floor.
